g.text: Normal Account Insert - Tagging Flow (3 Steps)
Returns customers that SHOULD be tagged
Keep only customers returned by CheckExclude
Filter TW Tagged by exclusion result
If customer in TW Tagged result:
Merge TW Tagged data to ProcessTaggingModel
Merge Association PA data to ProcessTaggingModel
Step 3: Process TW Tagged Special LicSub
If customer has Special LicSub tagging:
Merge TW Special LicSub data to ProcessTaggingModel
- Later steps skip if already tagged (TaggingID != 0)
- Exclusion rules apply to TW tagging
- Association PA applied if not TW tagged
- Special LicSub applied if no other tagging
